Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 4}Next, a word from the valedictorian...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 5 21 0 4}From Class D, Mitsuru Kirijo-san.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}This last year, I accepted an important responsibility as student council president.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}When I first addressed you from this podium...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}I spoke to you all about seizing opportunity while you had the chance...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Well, it must have been fate that intervened and gave me an important reminder of this...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}As many of you may know, my father unexpectedly passed away due to illness...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}To tell the truth, after losing my father, I also lost much of my self-confidence.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}I had overestimated my ability to handle everything alone, because I believed it was the right thing to do.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}There are times when we can't stand without the support of others...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}After my father's death, I received kind words from many people.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}You all taught me the value of allowing yourself to be cared for and protected.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}I hope to continue forward with the support of those around me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}For us graduates, it was truly an honor to share the last three years with all of you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_9_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 10 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 10 25 25}Thank you so much... for those wonderful years...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}I guess even the student council president cries too, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}You know, that girl we saw at the front gate.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}I thought she'd be at the graduation ceremony, but I guess not...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 0 25 25}Oh, her. Well, there's a lot of people who didn't show. Actually, I'm surprised YOU didn't skip.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}Man, so that's gonna be us next year? It feels so soon...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 3 25 25}You know how the student council president was crying? I can sorta relate, since my dad passed away, too.[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 0 25 25}But that stuff she said about seizing opportunities? Gimme a break. How does she expect us to know what to do with that?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 0 25 25}I mean, yeah, it's important, but that's more for people who already know what they want in life.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}Well, at least one of us knows what he wants...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 1 25 25}You seem to be getting along pretty well with a certain someone, if ya know what I mean...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 0 25 25}Well, anyway, there's no hurry to decide what we wanna do with our lives, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 0 25 25}I mean, I already have so much on my plate right now, you know?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 0 25 25}If life is all about the pursuit of happiness, then knowing the truth isn't everything, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 48 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 0 25 25}Sure, we do what we gotta do, but if we're taking a stand on every little thing, there'd be no end to it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 49 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 0 25 25}In the end, it doesn't matter how you spend your time, as long as you're happy.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 50 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 0 25 25}No one's gonna fault us for choosing to live in the moment, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 53 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 0 25 25}To be honest, I'm not that strong on my own...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 54 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 0 25 25}And when I feel insecure, I get worked up.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 56 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}Hey, I get it. Thinkin' never really gets me anywhere.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 57 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 1 25 25}When that happens, I just go do somethin' fun and forget about it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 60 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 1 25 25}They just need to chill out... You know, take it easy for a change.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 61 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 0 25 25}What're you gonna do if that plan backfires?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 64 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 1 25 25}And on that note, who's down for karaoke, anyone? Let's celebrate our future![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 65 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 6 25 25}Celebrating is for the graduates.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 67 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 3 25 25}Hey, what's with the preferential treatment?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 68 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 1 25 25}Well, now you're comin' whether you like it or not. I'll buy ya a drink, alright?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_037_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Looks like I don't have any other choice.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I go to karaoke with them?[n]{f 1 1}
